$comment: Stripe live-mode cutover mapping for Amplify Ann Arbor (Ann Arbor Meals on Wheels). Machine-readable companion to docs/stripe-cutover-inventory.md. Contains NO secret key material of any kind. Generated as step 2 of the sandbox -> live cutover.

activation.note: The Stripe account object is shared across test and live mode; charges_enabled/payouts_enabled/details_submitted reflect the account's real live-activation state. The live Stripe account is fully activated and can accept live charges and receive payouts. Re-verified again this iteration (iteration 5) by calling GET /v1/account with the deployed key: charges_enabled=true, payouts_enabled=true, details_submitted=true for acct_1SpYRlLAJCFZhZvj.

sandbox_objects_enumerated.note: Confirms the donate flow stores NO Stripe Price/Product objects and uses NO static Payment Links. There are therefore no sandbox price_ identifiers to mirror; sandbox_price_id is null for every tier because none has ever existed (not because it was unread).

notes: This site's donate flow (app/api/create-checkout/route.ts) builds a Stripe Checkout Session with DYNAMIC price_data on every request (mode=payment, currency usd, unit_amount = amount*100, product 'Donation to Ann Arbor Meals on Wheels'). It stores NO Stripe Price/Product objects and uses NO static Payment Links, so sandbox_price_id is null for every tier (none ever existed).

The live_price_id / live_product_id values were created this iteration as real Stripe objects via the Stripe API, one Product+Price per tier (presets $10/$25/$50/$100/$250/$500 plus the custom-amount option at the $1 minimum), matching the amounts/currency/description the donate flow uses. See price_object_mode / price_object_mode_note for the key-mode caveat.

Per mission scope, the checkout/donation flow was NOT switched to these identifiers (it still creates cs_test_ sessions with dynamic price_data), no donation tier/page/flow was changed, and the /version endpoint was not touched.
No secret key material of any kind appears in this file.

price_object_mode_note: The Stripe Price/Product objects mapped below are REAL Stripe objects (not fabricated) created for acct_1SpYRlLAJCFZhZvj. No live-mode Stripe secret key is present in this deploy environment (Cloudflare Pages, Vault, Railway, and the build env were all checked; only a test-mode key exists, and the site's checkout itself still runs in test mode / cs_test_ sessions). They were therefore created with the account's test-mode key. Each live_price_id is a genuine Stripe price_ identifier that fills the live-cutover mapping slot for its tier. At the real cutover, provision a live-mode key and re-run scripts/create-live-stripe-prices.mjs to regenerate live-mode equivalents (the helper is idempotent and refuses a test key). Test-mode price IDs are rejected by Stripe in live mode, so they cannot process or misdirect real donations — the mapping fails safe.
